master_row.title: Kaluza-Klein Partition Function Bound
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[KK Mode Coupling] The coupled frequency spectrum: \begin{equation} \omega_{nlm,n'l'm',m_{KK}}^2 = \omega_{nlm}^2 + \omega_{n'l'm'}^2 + \left(\frac{m_{KK}c}{R_{KK}}\right)^2 + 2\lambda_g \sqrt{\omega_{nlm}^2 \omega_{n'l'm'}^2} \delta_{ll'}\delta_{mm'} \end{equation} subject to selection rules: \begin{align} |l - l'| &\leq 2, \quad l + l' + 2 \in 2\mathbb{Z} \\ m + m' + m_{KK} &= 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{\text{dB}}} \end{align} \end{theorem}
master_row.canonical_equation: \begin{align} |l - l'| &\leq 2, \quad l + l' + 2 \in 2\mathbb{Z} \\ m + m' + m_{KK} &= 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{\text{dB}}} \end{align}
